title: Will Murdoch Succession Saga Make Michael Wolff's Fox News Book A Hit?
text: Out today, “The Fall: The End of Fox News and the Murdoch Dynasty” couldn't have had better timing with Lachlan Murdoch taking over for Rupert. A look at sales numbers.

title: Find Your Next Obsession with Tubi's New GPT-4 Powered Content Discovery Feature
text: Tubi's New Beta Feature, Rabbit AI, Offers Viewers a New Way to Discover Content SAN FRANCISCO , Sept. 26, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Tubi (www.tubi.tv), Fox Corporation's (NASDAQ: FOXA, FOX) ad-supported video-on-demand service, has announced Rabbit AI, a first-of-its-kind mobile feature powered by ChatGPT-4 that offers viewers a new way to navigate the platform and discover movies and TV shows.

title: Fox: The Upside Is Higher Than Some Believe
text: Fox Corporation is a controversial investment due to its political lean, but it has the potential for double-digit earnings growth. The company has a strong balance sheet and impressive revenue growth, despite the decline in overall advertising. Analysts predict a potential RoR of over 25% for Fox, and the company has a history of beating estimates.

title: Lachlan Murdoch backs Fox board role for former Australian PM who called climate change science 'absolute crap'
text: Former Australian prime minister Tony Abbott has been nominated to Fox Corp's board of directors. The rightwing politician is a controversial figure who's called climate change science "absolute crap.

title: The Score: Moderna, Splunk, Fox and More Stocks That Defined the Week
text: Here are some of the major companies whose stocks moved on the week's news.

title: Rupert Murdoch's 2023 pay at Fox swells 24% to $22.9 million
text: Fox Corp's former chairman Rupert Murdoch's total compensation for 2023 climbed more than 24% to $22.9 million, a regulatory filing showed on Friday.

title: Rupert Murdoch exit may give Trump a Fox News 'reset,' Republican strategists say
text: Rupert Murdoch's departure as the chairman of Fox Corp and News Corp could provide an opportunity to mend the relationship between former President Donald Trump and Fox News as the 2024 election campaign heats up, said a former adviser to Trump and Republican strategists.

title: Who is Lachlan Murdoch? Rupert's eldest son is set to inherit an empire
text: Lachlan Murdoch will officially inherit his father's massive media empire after a decision Thursday named him the sole chairman of News Corp (NASDAQ:NWS)oration.  Lachlan, Rupert Murdoch's eldest son, now sits at the helm of the company behind Fox News, the Wall Street Journal and the New York Post, among others.

title: Fox And News Corp Stock Surges As Rupert Murdoch Steps Down
text: Rupert Murdoch will step down from News Corp and the Fox Corporation after decades at the helm of the right-leaning news giant.

title: FOX Stock Alert: What to Know as Rupert Murdoch Steps Down From Fox
text: Capping off a tumultuous period for Fox Corporation (NASDAQ: FOX , NASDAQ: FOXA ) — which owns conservative-leaning Fox News — Chairman Rupert Murdoch just announced that he will step down from his role. Murdoch will also exit his role as Chairman of News Corp (NASDAQ: NWSA ), which owns names like The Wall Street Journal and New York Post.

title: Murdoch Leaves Fox: Here's A Timeline Of Billionaire Network Chair's Roller-Coaster Relationship With Trump
text: Rupert Murdoch had at one point regularly advised former President Donald Trump during his presidency, though their relationship soured by the 2020 election.

title: Markets shrug off Rupert Murdoch's pending departure from News Corp and Fox
text: Markets took the news of Rupert Murdoch's decision to step down as chairman of News Corp (NASDAQ:NWS) and Fox Corporation in their stride Thursday, with shares of the publisher of titles, including The Wall Street Journal, Dow Jones and the UK's Sun and The Times newspapers, edging higher. Fox's shares also rose.

title: Rupert Murdoch: the billionaire mogul at the helm of a global media empire
text: Rupert Murdoch stepped down as the chairman of Fox Corp and News Corp on Thursday, ending a long reign that saw him develop and lead a global media empire.

title: Reactions: Media mogul Rupert Murdoch steps down as chairman of Fox, News Corp
text: Media mogul Rupert Murdoch, 92, has stepped down as the chairman of Fox Corp and News Corp , ending a more than seven-decade career in which he created an empire spanning from Australia to the United States.

title: Read Rupert Murdoch's memo to staff announcing he's stepping down from Fox and News Corp.
text: Rupert Murdoch said Thursday he's stepping down as chair of Fox and News  Corp. Murdoch will exit his role in November. His eldest son, Lachlan Murdoch, will be his successor.

title: Rupert Murdoch to end seven-decade reign as news media mogul
text: News mogul Rupert Murdoch is officially stepping down as chairman of News Corp (NASDAQ:NWS) and Fox, ending a career spanning seven decades, four marriages and millions of dollars of Republican Party donations. His son Lachlan Murdoch, who has long been groomed to take the mantle on his father's retirement, will take over as News Corp chairman while maintaining his role as chief executive of Fox.

title: Rupert Murdoch says in letter: "Our companies are in robust health, as am I"
text: Rupert Murdoch has told employees at Fox Corp and News Corp that the companies were "in robust health, as am I" as he announced he was stepping down as the firms' chairman.

title: Rupert Murdoch is stepping down as chair of Fox Corp. and News Corp and handing the reins to son Lachlan
text: The 92-year-old media tycoon announced the news in a memo to employees, saying he will transfer to the role of chairman emeritus of both companies.

title: Rupert Murdoch just resigned as Chairman of Fox Corp and News Corp
text: Rupert Murdoch – the media industry mogul has resigned as Chairman of Fox Corp and News Corp. Shares of both companies opened slightly down today. Murdoch will become Chairman Emeritus The 92-year-old veteran will now hold an honorary title of Chairman Emeritus at both companies.

title: Rupert Murdoch takes on new role as son Lachlan becomes sole chair of NewsCorp and Fox
text: "For my entire professional life, I have been engaged daily with news and ideas, and that will not change," Rupert Murdoch told colleagues in a Thursday morning memo to his workforce of 35,000.

title: Rupert Murdoch Stepping Down From Fox And News Corp
text: Murdoch's eldest son Lachlan will take over in November.

title: Rupert Murdoch Stepping Down As Chair Of News Corp. And Fox
text: Rupert Murdoch is stepping dpwn as chairman of the board of Fox and News Corp. in November, the companies said today. He will be appointed Chairman Emeritus of each company.

title: Rupert Murdoch is stepping down from running Fox News and is handing the reins to his son, Lachlan
text: Rupert Murdoch is stepping down from his current role on Fox News, according to media reporter Brian Stelter, who posted the news on X Thursday morning.  "I'm writing to let you all know that I have decided to transition to the role of Chairman Emeritus at Fox and News," Murdoch said in a memo to Fox employees obtained by Stelter.

title: Rupert Murdoch's successor revealed as he steps down as chair of Fox and News Corp
text: Rupert Murdoch is stepping down as chair of Fox and News Corp...

title: Rupert Murdoch steps down as chairman of Fox and News Corp.
text: Rupert Murdoch is stepping down as chairman of the board of both Fox Corp. and News Corp., the company said on Thursday. The move will be official in November. Murdoch, 92, will be appointed chairman emeritus of each company. Lachlan Murdoch, one of his sons, will become sole chairman of New

title: K. RUPERT MURDOCH TO BE APPOINTED CHAIRMAN EMERITUS OF FOX CORPORATION AND NEWS CORP
text: LOS ANGELES and NEW YORK , Sept. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Following a career that began nearly 70 years ago in 1954, Fox Corporation ("FOX") (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX) and News Corporation ("News Corp") (Nasdaq: NWS, NWSA; ASX: NWS, NWSLV) announced today that Rupert Murdoch is stepping down as chairman of each board effective as of the upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of each company in mid-November.

title: Rupert Murdoch steps down as chairman of Fox, News Corp
text: Media mogul Rupert Murdoch has stepped down as the chairman of Fox Corp and News Corp , the companies said on Thursday.

title: Rupert Murdoch to Step Down as Chair of Fox and News Corp
text: Murdoch will exit roles atop News Corp and Fox in November and will be appointed chairman emeritus.

title: FOX News Digital Marks 30 Consecutive Months as Top News Brand With Multiplatform Minutes
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FOX News Digital finished August marking 30 consecutive months as the top news brand with multiplatform minutes, according to Comscore. FOX News Digital also led news brands with multiplatform views and saw both monthly and yearly growth with multiplatform views, multiplatform minutes and multiplatform unique visitors. FOX News Digital closed out the month reaching 3.2 billion total multiplatform minutes, 1.8 billion total multiplatform views, and 92 million multiplat.

title: New York City pension funds and Oregon sue Fox over 2020 election coverage
text: NEW YORK — New York City's pension funds and the state of Oregon sued Fox Corporation on Tuesday, alleging the company harmed investors by allowing Fox News to broadcast falsehoods about the 2020 election that exposed the network to defamation lawsuits.

title: New York City Retirement Funds Sue Fox For “Disregarding Defamation Risk” In Election Coverage
text: A group of New York City pension funds, along with others from the state of Oregon, have sued Fox Corp. and its officers and directors for “consciously disregarding defamation risk.

title: Fox Sued Again: NYC Pension Funds Allege False Election Coverage Exposed Company To Defamation
text: The funds hold millions of dollars worth of Fox shares and had more than $253 billion in assets under management at the end of the 2023 fiscal year.

title: Executives Bought Shares at Forward Air and Fox
text: It seems only logical that trades by a company's executives would provide a clue to that company's outlook.

title: Fox Corporation Chief Financial Officer Steve Tomsic to Participate in Upcoming BofA Securities 2023 Media, Communications & Entertainment Conference
text: NEW YORK and LOS ANGELES , Sept. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX) today announced that Chief Financial Officer Steve Tomsic will participate in the BofA Securities 2023 Media, Communications & Entertainment Conference on September 14, at approximately 9:40am (Eastern), 6:40am (Pacific).

title: Tubi Surpasses 74 Million Monthly Active Users
text: Hits 1.4% of Total TV Viewing Time as The Most Watched Free Ad-Supported TV Streaming Service in the U.S. World's Largest Content Library Now Exceeds 200,000 Movies and TV Episodes and Nearly 200 Tubi Originals SAN FRANCISCO , Sept. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Tubi (www.tubi.tv), Fox Corporation's (NASDAQ: FOXA, FOX) ad-supported video-on-demand service, today announced the company surpassed 74 million monthly active users and logged nearly 4 billion streaming hours for the first half of the calendar year.

title: Want to watch every NFL game without cable this season? Here's how much it will cost you.
text: Are you ready for some football? Well, if you want to watch every single game this season, then be ready to shell out some serious cash across several different networks and streaming platforms — especially you Spectrum subscribers.

title: Disney's feud with Spectrum owner Charter slams entertainment stocks
text: Disney blocked its cable channels, including ESPN and ABC, from being shown on Charter's Spectrum network after the two companies failed to secure a distribution agreement.

title: US entertainment shares slide as Disney, Charter squabble over cable fees
text: Shares of several U.S. entertainment companies including Fox Corp and Warner Brothers Discovery Inc were dragged down on Friday by a dispute between media heavyweight Disney and cable provider Charter Communications over television distribution fees.
